---
title: "Gagan Anekonda Veereshi"
description-meta: "Personal website of Gagan Anekonda Veereshi"
image: "pic.jpeg"

about:
    id: info
    template: trestles
    image-width: 50%
    links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: 'E-mail: avavg78 [at] gmail [dot] com' 
      href: mailto:gagan.av78@gmail.com

    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/gitgan78
      target: _blank
    
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qQBOYzAAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
      target: _blank

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gagan-anekonda-veereshi-81a463219
      target: _blank
  
    - icon: globe
      text: Website
      href: https://quagan.xyz
      target: _blank
      
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0006-6703-8590
      target: _blank

---

:::{#info}
##### Hi, I am Gagan Anekonda Veereshi. Here's my short bio:

### Experience:
1. Work Student for Quantum Technology and Data Science, [data cybernetics](https://data-cybernetics.com/en/), Nov 2024 - Aug 2025

2. Student Research Assistant (HiWi), [Center for Optical Quantum Technologies](https://www.physik.uni-hamburg.de/en/iqp/zoq.html), March 2023 - Sep 2024

3. Research Intern, [Society for Space Education Research and Development](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sserd/), Nov 2021 - Dec 2021

### Education:
1. Master of Science in Physics, [University of Hamburg](https://www.uni-hamburg.de/en.html), Oct 2022 - Jul 2025

2. Bachelor of Science in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics, [Christ (Deemed to be University)](https://www.christuniversity.in/), Jun 2019 - May 2022

### Research Metrics:

1. Citations: 12
2. h-index: 1
3. i-10 index: 1
